description: Extract structured fields from the conversation — explicit or inferred.
purpose: Captures structured field values from the conversation and writes them to memory. Reach for this whenever the user provides something worth remembering — a name, an age, an intent classification, an emotional state, a routing tag. Set a field's `source` to `explicit` for values the user literally stated ("my name is X") and `inferred` for values the model concludes from context ("they seem frustrated"). Place it BEFORE the Talker in the chain so the Talker can read the freshly-captured values inline via {{field:X}} or as part of {{memory}}. Phase B: the whole prompt is one mention-aware string. {{fields_schema}} and {{fields_current}} are auto-injected from the wired field set; place them where the schema reference reads best.

defaultConfig.prompt:
Extract field values from the user's latest message and recent context.

JSON keys MUST be the exact field names from the schema — character-for-character. Don't translate, alias, or rephrase them. Values can be in any language; keys must not.

## Fields
{{fields_schema}}

## Already collected
{{fields_current}}

Only include keys you have a value for. Omit the rest. Never use null, empty strings, or placeholders like "unknown". Return {} when nothing was extracted.
